userStories.title: Audit all GitHub vulnerabilities - triage and fix CRITICAL and HIGH
acceptanceCriteria: List all 7 vulnerabilities with package, severity, current version, patched version, action and risk decision
Fix every CRITICAL and HIGH advisory with available patches
Assess MODERATE and LOW advisories and fix when covered by the same safe upgrade
Document all findings in docs/security-audit.md
userStories.verificationCommand: gh api /repos/Huntsman1756/esdata/dependabot/alerts --jq '[.[] | select(.state=="open" and (.security_vulnerability.severity=="critical" or .security_vulnerability.severity=="high"))] | length' 2>/dev/null | grep '^0$' && echo PASS || echo 'FAIL or default branch still awaiting merge scan'

userStories.title: VPS hardening - create deploy user, disable root login, confirm UFW and fail2ban
acceptanceCriteria: Create and verify deploy user SSH before disabling root
Disable root SSH login and reload sshd
Confirm UFW active with DB port closed externally
Confirm fail2ban active and monitoring SSH
userStories.verificationCommand: ssh deploy@${VPS_HOST} 'echo deploy-user-ok' && ssh -o PasswordAuthentication=no root@${VPS_HOST} 'echo' 2>&1 | grep -i 'Permission denied\|Connection refused' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-CHECK-SSH-MANUALLY

userStories.title: Test backup restore - not just backup existence
acceptanceCriteria: Locate latest DB backup
Restore into non-production test database
Compare core row counts against production backup time
Drop restore test DB after verification
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d esdata_restore_test -tAc 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aeat_modelo' 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '^0$' && echo PASS || echo 'FAIL or test DB not found'

userStories.title: Merge fix/aeat-29-models-resource-audit to main - with full regression gate
acceptanceCriteria: Run full test suite before merge
Merge with --no-ff
Run mcp_validation_suite on VPS after merge
Confirm /status API OK, DB OK, stale_workers=0
userStories.verificationCommand: git log --oneline -3 main && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '{api, db, stale_workers}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: Write RELEASE.md - honest contract language, not marketing
acceptanceCriteria: Document trusted domains
Document limited-evidence domains
Document non-covered domains
Define response contracts and known limitations

userStories.title: Create and push tag v1.0.0
acceptanceCriteria: Main clean and all release commits present
Annotated tag v1.0.0 created and pushed
Remote tag verified
mcp_validation_suite and /status green after tag
userStories.verificationCommand: git ls-remote --tags origin | grep -q 'refs/tags/v1.0.0' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '.api' | grep -q 'ok\|OK' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Set up weekly accuracy review schedule - BOE, AEAT, EUR-Lex, CNMV, ESMA
acceptanceCriteria: Create weekly accuracy check script
Check freshness thresholds per domain
Install Monday 08:00 Europe/Madrid cron on VPS
Exit non-zero when stale threshold fails
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f scripts/weekly-accuracy-check.sh && bash scripts/weekly-accuracy-check.sh && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final smoke test - 10 real queries across all live domains post-release
acceptanceCriteria: Run 10 production queries across AEAT, BOE, DGT, CNMV, AEPD, EUR-Lex and /status
All 10 must pass after v1.0.0 tag
Any failure blocks release
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '.api' | grep -q 'ok\|OK' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/aeat/303 | jq '.verified' | grep -q 'true' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/aeat/290 | jq '.completeness' | grep -q 'parcial' && echo 'CORE SMOKE PASS - run full 10-query suite manually'
